name: WATOJUTSU: ZETSUGI - KOFUKU ZETTOUSEI (WATOJUTSU: ULTIMATE ATTACK - CROUCHING TIGER SEVERING SWORD RUSH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Stance)

Rank: 13

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 38 | Successes: 7

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 36

Components: M, F, Mas

This Wato technique is actually a stance, allowing the user to make the ultimate attack of the style. The user enters a stance with his sword placed along the back of his hand.

The technique can be released as an instant action anytime the user is targeted by a melee attack. While doing so the user gains +1 dodge bonus to defense and reflex saves per 3 levels (up to +6) against the aforementioned attack, and if said attack misses he can counter with own attack with bonus equal to that of his previous dodge bonus. If he hits, he deals triple damage and the opponent must make a massive damage save regardless of damage dealt (if the user scores a critical hit he deals 4 times the damage, not 6 times).

This stance is instantly broken if the user performs any technique that has perform time longer time than swift action to perform or moves more than 5 ft. in a round.

Requires: : Senran Tou Sei (5), 3 rd step of mastery in all other Watou Jutsu techniques

Mastery: The first, third and fifth step of mastery the distance the user can move without breaking the stance by 5 feet.

Material Focus -The user's Wato, katana, double katana or hansori.

Taijutsu
